AI.summary: Microsoft is looking into ways it can integrate OpenClaw-style features into its Copilot AI assistant, according to a report from The Information. The test reportedly comes as part of efforts to make Microsoft 365 Copilot "run autonomously around the clock" while completing tasks on behalf of users.…

AI.summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg could soon have an AI clone of himself to interact with and provide feedback to employees, according to a report from the Financial Times. Sources tell the outlet that Meta is training the AI avatar on Zuckerberg's image and voice, along with his mannerisms, tone, and public…

AI.title: You Can Soon Buy a $4,370 Humanoid Robot on AliExpress
AI.summary: Unitree is bringing its R1 to international markets. It arrives with some aerobatic capabilities and an entry-level price, but the question of what you'd actually do with it remains open.

AI.title: Meta Is Warned That Facial Recognition Glasses Will Arm Sexual Predators
AI.summary: More than 70 organizations, including the ACLU, EPIC, and Fight for the Future, say the AI smart glasses feature would endanger abuse victims, immigrants, and LGBTQ+ people.

AI.title: The Internet's Most Powerful Archiving Tool Is in Peril
AI.summary: As major news outlets cut off the Wayback Machine, journalists and advocacy groups are rallying to protect the Internet Archive’s vast collection of web pages.

AI.title: AI Agents Are Coming for Your Dating Life
AI.summary: The developers of Pixel Societies are using AI agents to simulate social interactions. It's an attempt optimize the process of choosing new colleagues, friends, and even romantic partners.

游戏.title: Bloodborne: R-Rated Animated Movie in Development With JackSepticEye Producing
游戏.summary: Sony Pictures announced at CinemaCon that they are making an R-rated animated feature film based on the video game Bloodborne. It will be produced by PlayStation Productions, Lyrical Animation, and YouTuber and gamer Seán McLoughlin, aka JackSepticEye.

游戏.title: Sony Pictures at CinemaCon 2026: Everything Revealed
游戏.summary: From Spider-Man: Brand New Day to Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse to Jumanji: Open World to an R-Rated animated Bloodborne movie, here all the big reveals from Sony Pictures Entertainment's CinemaCon 2026 presentation.

游戏.title: George R.R. Martin Is Not Releasing The Winds of Winter This Fall, Book Publisher Confirms
游戏.summary: A Song of Ice and Fire publisher Bantam Books has stepped in to debunk claims that George R.R. Martin was ready to release the long-awaited The Winds of Winter.

游戏.title: Marvel Comics Reveals DNX, Its Next Big X-Men Crossover
游戏.summary: Marvel Comics has revealed the first details about DNX, a major new crossover event that pits the X-Men and Fantastic Four against the original version of Beast.

游戏.title: New Xbox CEO Comments on Game Pass
游戏.summary: The new Xbox CEO, Asha Sharma, has reportedly shared a memo with Microsoft employees that stated "Game Pass has become too expensive for players."

游戏.title: DC's Epic Medieval Fantasy Universe Returns in Dark Knights of Steel II
游戏.summary: DC has given fans their first good look at Dark Knights of Steel II, which gives the DCU a Game of Thrones-style makeover.

游戏.title: Former Naughty Dog Dev Recalls Crunch Culture for Games Like The Last of Us and Uncharted
游戏.summary: Former Naughty Dog designer Benson Russell has explained how the developer eventually began to believe workplace crunch was necessary to make games like The Last of Us at its "level."

游戏.title: Scarlett Johansson Reflects on Being 'Pigeonholed' and 'Pulled Apart' for Her Appearance Early in Her Career
游戏.summary: Scarlett Johansson is opening up about being “pigeonholed” and “pulled apart” for her appearance in the early days of her career, which she notes was a “socially acceptable” thing to do at that time.

游戏.title: More Than 20 Classic Warhammer PC Games Just Hit Steam, Including Shadow of the Horned Rat, Warhammer 40,000: Fire Warrior, and Space Hulk — Check Out the List in Full
游戏.summary: More than 20 classic Warhammer PC video games have hit Steam as part of a new Warhammer Classics initiative. Check out the list in full.

游戏.title: After Widespread Criticism for Being a Pokémon Clone, Pickmon Developer Announces Name Change 'To Better Align With Our Brand Identity and Lore'
游戏.summary: Following widespread fan complaints over copied character designs, the developer of upcoming Steam Pokémon-like Pickmon has said it is now changing the game's name — by one letter — to Pickmos.

游戏.title: 'It Was the Opposite of What You Saw in the Movie' — American Pie Actress Shannon Elizabeth Details 'Difficult' Audition Where She Had to Dance for Jason Biggs
游戏.summary: American Pie star Shannon Elizabeth had her breakout role in the beloved 1999 teen comedy — but before packing on the laughs, she recently revealed she was “really scared” during the audition process.

游戏.title: Harry Potter Star Daniel Radcliffe Says He No Longer Feels 'Cringe' When Watching Himself in the Early Movies — Though Disagrees With Andrew Garfield's Praise That He Was Really Good
游戏.summary: Harry Potter movie star Daniel Radcliffe has said he disagrees with praise for his performance from former Spider-Man Andrew Garfield, though no longer feels "cringe" about the earlier films.

游戏.title: James Bond Game 007: First Light Story Spoilers Leak Following Ratings Board Snafu
游戏.summary: Major story spoilers for the upcoming James Bond game 007: First Light are reportedly circulating online, following a leak that originated from the Indonesian Ratings Board.

Needless to say, fans aren’t happy, but creator R. Scot Gemmill and star Noah W…

游戏.title: Pokémon Go Player Says He's Fighting The Pokémon Company Over Championship Game Loss For 'Unsportsmanlike' Celebration, But Holds No 'Ill Will'
游戏.summary: A competitive Pokémon Go player who had their recent tournament victory scrubbed over "unsportsmanlike" behavior is now fighting The Pokémon Company to have the decision overturned.

科技.title: An Amazon warehouse worker died on the job at Oregon facility
科技.summary: Though Amazon has faced issues with warehouse safety, the company said that the death was not work related.

科技.title: OpenAI has bought AI personal finance startup Hiro
科技.summary: The acquisition indicates a capability that OpenAI is building into ChatGPT: financial planning.

科技.title: Uber and Nuro begin testing premium robotaxi service in San Francisco
科技.summary: Uber employees can now hail a Lucid robotaxi as part of the testing.

科技.title: Microsoft is officially killing its Outlook Lite app next month
科技.summary: Launched in 2022, Outlook Lite is a lightweight version of the regular Outlook app, designed for Android phones with limited storage and regions with slower internet connections. The app had already been scheduled for retirement.

科技.title: Thousands of rare concert recordings are landing on the Internet Archive — listen now
科技.summary: Chicago-based music superfan Aadam Jacobs has been recording the concerts he goes to since the 1980s, amassing an archive of over 10,000 tapes.

科技.title: IBM pays $17M fine to end DOJ suit over DEI programs
科技.summary: IBM entered into a $17 million settlement agreement on Friday with the U.S. DOJ over allegations that it engaged in “illegal DEI practices.”

科技.title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
科技.summary: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.

科技.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
科技.summary: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.

科技.title: FBI announces takedown of phishing operation that targeted thousands of victims
科技.summary: Cybercriminals allegedly used the W3LL phishing kit to target more than 17,000 victims worldwide, stealing their passwords and multi-factor authentication codes.

科技.title: Booking.com confirms hackers accessed customers’ data
科技.summary: The travel giant notified customers that their personal data, including names, email addresses, and phone numbers, may have been accessed in a security incident.

科技.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch signals IPO readiness as AI agents fuel revenue surge
科技.summary: While many startups founded prior to the emergence of ChatGPT are struggling to position themselves for the AI era, Vercel, a 10-year-old dev tool and website hosting platform, is benefiting from the explosion of AI-generated apps and agents.

科技.title: Hack at Anodot leaves over a dozen breached companies facing extortion
科技.summary: The data breach at Anodot, which affects customers like Rockstar Games, is the latest hack aimed at stealing data from a large number of corporate giants.

科技.title: Slate Auto raises $650M to fund its affordable EV truck plans
科技.summary: Slate Auto's latest funding round was led by existing investor TWG Global, a firm run by LA Dodgers owner Mark Walter.

科技.title: Roblox introduces ‘Kids’ and ‘Select’ accounts for age-appropriate access to games and chat
科技.summary: Users aged five to nine will be assigned to a "Roblox Kids" account, and users aged nine to 15 to will be put in a "Roblox Select" account.

科技.title: The largest orbital compute cluster is open for business
科技.summary: Kepler Communications is flying 40 GPUs in Earth orbit. And its latest customer is Sophia Space.
